```python
    result = []
    is_min = True
    while lst:
        if is_min:
            min_val = min(lst)
            result.append(min_val)
            lst.remove(min_val)
        else:
            max_val = max(lst)
            result.append(max_val)
            lst.remove(max_val)
        is_min = not is_min
    return result
```
